6   package mockit.asm.annotations.testdata;
7   
8   import java.lang.annotation.ElementType;
9   
10  @ComplexAnnotation(intValues = { 1, 2, 3 }, boolValues = { true, false }, stringValues = { "a",
11          "b" }, enumValue = ElementType.METHOD, nested = @SimpleAnnotation("inner"), classValue = String.class)
12  public final class AnnotatedWithPrimitiveArrays {
13  }
